name: front
description: Read Front shared-inbox conversations and messages and send replies on behalf of your team

envVars.name: FRONT_API_TOKEN
envVars.description: Front API token, created under Settings → Developers → API Tokens (sent as Authorization: Bearer)

tools.name: List Conversations
tools.description: List conversations across your Front inboxes, most recently updated first

q.description: Search query object filtering by status, e.g. q[statuses][]=assigned (statuses: assigned, unassigned, archived, trashed)

limit.description: Max number of results per page (up to 100)

page_token.description: Token from the previous response's _pagination.next URL to fetch the next page

sort_by.description: Field used to sort the conversations; only supports 'date'

historicalSummary.omitted: assignee/recipient objects, tags, links, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Conversation
tools.description: Retrieve a single conversation with its subject, status, assignee, recipient, and tags

tools.name: List Conversation Messages
tools.description: List the messages in a conversation thread, including bodies and authors

limit.description: Max number of results per page (up to 100)

page_token.description: Token from the previous response's _pagination.next URL to fetch the next page

historicalSummary.omitted: full message bodies, attachments, recipient objects, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Reply to Conversation
tools.description: Send a reply message in an existing conversation (archives the conversation by default)

conversationId.description: Conversation ID to reply in, e.g. cnv_55c8c149

body.description: Body of the message (HTML supported for email)

to.description: List of recipient handles (e.g. email addresses) who will receive this message; defaults to the conversation's recipients

cc.description: List of recipient handles who will receive a copy of this message

text.description: Text version of the body for email messages

channel_id.description: Channel ID the message is sent from; defaults to the original conversation channel

author_id.description: ID of the teammate on behalf of whom the reply is sent

options.description: Sending options, e.g. { "archive": false } to keep the conversation open after replying (archive defaults to true)

tools.name: Update Conversation
tools.description: Update a conversation's assignee, status, inbox, or tags, e.g. to assign, archive, or reopen it without sending a message

conversationId.description: Conversation ID to update, e.g. cnv_55c8c149

assignee_id.description: ID of the teammate to assign the conversation to; set to null to unassign

status.description: New conversation status: open, archived, deleted, or spam

inbox_id.description: ID of the inbox to move the conversation to

tag_ids.description: List of tag IDs replacing all of the conversation's current tags

tools.name: Search Conversations
tools.description: Full-text search across conversations with operators like from:, tag:, inbox:, is:open, before:/after:

query.description: Search query combining free text and operators, e.g. 'refund inbox:inb_123 is:open' or 'tag:tag_345 after:1700000000'

limit.description: Max number of results per page (up to 100)

page_token.description: Token from the previous response's _pagination.next URL to fetch the next page

historicalSummary.omitted: assignee/recipient objects, tags, links, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: List Teammates
tools.description: List the teammates in the company to find teammate IDs for assignment and reply authorship

tools.name: List Inboxes
tools.description: List the shared inboxes in the company to find inbox IDs and names

limit.description: Max number of results per page (up to 100)

page_token.description: Token from the previous response's _pagination.next URL to fetch the next page

prompts.title: Review open conversations
prompts.prompt: List the open conversations in my Front inboxes and summarize who is waiting on a reply.

prompts.title: Draft a reply
prompts.prompt: Read the messages in a Front conversation I specify and draft a concise, friendly reply that resolves the request.

prompts.title: Inbox overview
prompts.prompt: List my Front inboxes and give me a quick overview of conversation volume and status per inbox.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Front setup

steps.title: Get a Front account
steps.description: Sign up at https://front.com — a free trial workspace is enough for testing. You can also request a developer sandbox at https://dev.frontapp.com.

steps.title: Create an API token
steps.description: In Front, open Settings → Developers → API Tokens and click 'Create API token'. Give it a descriptive name and pick the scopes you need (read access for browsing, plus shared resource access to send replies). Admin privileges are required to manage tokens.

steps.title: Store the token
steps.description: Add FRONT_API_TOKEN=<your token> to your .env file. Requests authenticate with the header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' against https://api2.frontapp.com.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Inboxes tool. You should get back the inboxes your token's scopes can see.

notes: Replying to a conversation archives it by default — pass options { "archive": false } to keep it open
Message sending is asynchronous: the reply endpoint returns 202 Accepted with a message_uid rather than the final message
API tokens are scoped at creation time; a token without the messaging scopes can read conversations but not send replies
